name: hero-city-pixel-perfect-hud
description: Verify the approved Hero City pixel crops drive the live HUD, mobile input shell, fist shop, and punch feedback without draft UI duplication.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD",5) local r=g:WaitForChild("PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD",5) local assets={PowerCard="rbxassetid://116369277219209",CoinsCard="rbxassetid://129024701441116",WallCard="rbxassetid://71796534980277",QuestCard="rbxassetid://98132697706518",DailyButton="rbxassetid://140223386174801",SpinButton="rbxassetid://107739720698002",RebirthButton="rbxassetid://129503393018469",ShopButton="rbxassetid://104281527974467",PetsButton="rbxassetid://94981950804472",QuestsButton="rbxassetid://130173685908715",ActionPunch="rbxassetid://86102957745205",ActionJump="rbxassetid://113344820616843",MovementJoystick="rbxassetid://105237841705957",SoundTool="rbxassetid://91707047961392",SettingsTool="rbxassetid://98048887733214",MoreTool="rbxassetid://103143983649151"} local exact=true for name,id in pairs(assets) do local item=r:FindFirstChild(name) exact=exact and item~=nil and item.Image==id and item:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIAspectRatioConstraint")~=nil end local noShells=r:FindFirstChild("BottomShellLeft")==nil and r:FindFirstChild("BottomShellRight")==nil local touch=p.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("TouchGui") local controls=touch and touch:FindFirstChild("TouchControlFrame") return H:JSONEncode({visible=r.Visible,exact=exact,noShells=noShells,powerValue=r.PowerCard:FindFirstChild("PowerValue")~=nil,coinsValue=r.CoinsCard:FindFirstChild("CoinsValue")~=nil,depthValue=r.WallCard:FindFirstChild("DepthValue")~=nil,oldStatus=g.HeroStatusDeck.Visible,oldControls=g.MobileControls.Visible,touchControls=controls~=nil and controls.Visible or false})

steps.label: pixel HUD is exact and draft controls are hidden

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage:WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation") c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local hrp=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart hrp.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) hrp.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local block=root["Depth Blocks"]:WaitForChild("DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02") local debris=root:WaitForChild("Depth Physics Debris") return H:JSONEncode({blocks=#root["Depth Blocks"]:GetChildren(),firstHP=block:GetAttribute("HP"),fragments=#debris:GetChildren()})

steps.label: break depth block through authoritative combat path

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local blocks=root:WaitForChild("Depth Blocks") local debris=root:WaitForChild("Depth Physics Debris") local broken,passable,visible=0,0,0 for _,block in ipairs(blocks:GetChildren()) do if block:GetAttribute("Broken") then broken+=1 if not block.CanCollide and not block.CanQuery and block.Transparency==1 then passable+=1 end end end for _,d in ipairs(debris:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") and d.Transparency<0.2 then visible+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({broken=broken,passable=passable,visible=visible})

steps.label: depth breach is open with visible debris

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab","Fists") task.wait(.35) local shop=g.GameMenu:FindFirstChild("FunctionalHeroShop",true) assert(shop,"functional shop missing") local cards,actions,art,tabs,minTouch=0,0,0,0,true for _,d in ipairs(shop:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("Frame") and string.find(d.Name,"ShopCard",1,true) then cards+=1 elseif d:IsA("TextButton") and string.find(d.Name,"Action",1,true) then actions+=1 elseif d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Name=="ProductArt" and d.Image~="" then art+=1 elseif d:IsA("TextButton") and string.find(d.Name,"ShopTab",1,true) then tabs+=1 end if d:IsA("TextButton") and (string.find(d.Name,"Action",1,true) or d.Name=="CloseShop" or string.find(d.Name,"ShopTab",1,true)) then minTouch=minTouch and d:FindFirstChildOfClass("UISizeConstraint")~=nil end end return H:JSONEncode({visible=shop.Visible,cards=cards,actions=actions,art=art,tabs=tabs,close=shop:FindFirstChild("CloseShop",true)~=nil,minTouch=minTouch})

steps.label: fist shop is fully assembled and interactive

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local center=0 for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d.Name=="FeedbackPop" or d.Name=="LocalDamageNumber" or d.Name=="CombatDamageBurst" or d.Name=="CombatImpactCore" or d.Name=="CombatSparkRays" then center+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({center=center,centerEnabled=g:GetAttribute("CenterActionFeedbackEnabled"),feedbackCount=g:GetAttribute("FeedbackCount") or 0,lastType=g:GetAttribute("LastFeedbackType")})
